summary: Static code verification PASSED for Sprint 4 Phase 1 (Provider Connections Upsert). All new endpoints are properly wired with secret masking. Runtime testing NOT POSSIBLE - WhatCEM app is not deployed to this preview environment.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Secret masking: maskSecret() function at line 7-11 masks secrets showing first 4 and last 4 chars with •••• in between
✅ sanitizeConnectionData() at lines 13-23 masks: authToken, apiKey, accessToken, clientSecret
✅ Both GET (line 42) and POST (line 149) responses use sanitizeConnectionData() for masking
✅ Route import: Line 77 in routes.ts - import providerConnectionsRoutes from './routes/provider-connections'
✅ Route mount: Line 568 in routes.ts - app.use('/api/integrations', ensureAuthenticated, providerConnectionsRoutes)
✅ Storage methods verified: getChannelConnectionsByCompany, updateChannelConnection, createChannelConnection all exist in storage.ts
✅ All changes are ADDITIVE - provider-connections.ts is a new file, routes.ts has 2 new lines (import + app.use)

success_rate.backend: 100% (static code verification - all routes, wiring, and secret masking confirmed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 4 Phase 1 Provider Connections code verification complete. The WhatCEM application code is in /app/New-LeadCEM/WhatCEM_Powerchat/ but is NOT deployed to the preview environment. Runtime testing requires deploying the actual WhatCEM app.
